arts.ttl: Europa League playoffs: Ajax, Fenerbahce, Real Sociedad and more in action – live
arts.sum: Europa League updates from around the grounds Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And mail Rob Paulo Dybala scores a beautiful equaliser for Roma! When he went off injured in the first leg it looked like he might out for while; Porto will wish that was the case. Dybala picked the ball up 25 yards from goal, played a smooth one-two with Eldor Shomurodov and scurried into the area. He held off a challenge, taking gentle touches all the while to ensure the ball didn’t get away from him, and then flicked a nonchalant finish over Diogo Costa with his left foot. I can hear Barry Davies in the mind’s ear: “Lovely goal! Lovely goal!” Roma 0-1 Porto (agg: 1-2) Bodo/Glimt 0-1 FC Twente (agg: 1-3) FCSB 1-0 PAOK (agg: 3-1) Galatasaray 0-0 Alkmaar (agg: 1-4) Continue reading...

Anderlecht return to Lotto Park with a three-goal deficit to try and overturn following last week's defeat to Fenerbahce in Istanbul. David Hubert's side bounced back from that first-leg loss with a ...
